Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0813 "NEPTUNELANDERELITE-0813" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Neptune Lander Elite (C64Mark - 2020).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Although the actual start address is $0810, $0813 was used so as to skip the routine at $26D1, which disables high-score loading and saving to disk
